meaning: 英文字母表中的第二十五個字母，大寫字母
sentences: Please write a large Y on the board. 請在黑板上寫一個大寫字母。
The class practiced saying Y and other letters aloud. 全班練習大聲念出這個字母和其他字母。

meaning: 英文字母表中的第二十五個字母，小寫字母
sentences: The lowercase y is easy to recognize in print. 小寫字母在印刷體中很容易辨認。
She traced the letter y with a pencil. 她用鉛筆描畫這個小寫字母。

meaning: 語氣詞；也可作為「是呀」一類的口語發語
sentences: Ya, I can help you with that today. 是呀，我今天可以幫你處理那件事。
He said ya before answering the easy question. 他在回答那個簡單問題前先說了這句話。

meaning: 口語中表示噪音、喊聲或胡言亂語的詞
sentences: The old story used yaba as a noisy cry. 那個老故事把這個詞當作喧鬧的喊聲。
The children laughed at the silly yaba in the song. 孩子們聽著歌裡滑稽的喊聲都笑了。
The boys would yabber all afternoon about football. 那些男孩會整個下午嘮叨足球。
Please do not yabber while the teacher is speaking. 老師說話時請不要一直嘮叨。
They caught a yabbi in the shallow creek. 他們在淺溪裡抓到一隻淡水小龍蝦。
The river bank is a good place to find yabbi. 河岸是尋找淡水小龍蝦的好地方。
He tends to yabble when he is nervous. 他緊張時就會開始胡扯。
Do not yabble too long about the same topic. 不要在同一個話題上碎碎念太久。
A yabby crawled under the rock near the pond. 一隻淡水小龍蝦爬進池邊的石頭下。
The children searched the creek for yabby. 孩子們在小溪裡找淡水小龍蝦。

meaning: 竹或木製的棒子；也可指某種稱呼
sentences: The guide carried a yabu while walking through the field. 嚮導走過田野時帶著一根竹棒。
In the old account, yabu was used as a local term. 在那份舊記錄裡，這個詞被當作地方用語。

meaning: 一種熱帶樹木；雅卡爾樹
sentences: The botanist identified the trunk as a yacal tree. 植物學家把那棵樹辨認為雅卡爾樹。
A yacal can grow well in warm forest areas. 雅卡爾樹在溫暖的森林地區長得很好。

meaning: 絲蘭；某些地區對龍舌蘭類植物的稱呼
sentences: The garden path was lined with yacca plants. 花園小徑兩旁種滿了絲蘭。
A yacca leaf can be sharp at the edge. 絲蘭的葉子邊緣可能很銳利。
The field notebook listed yachan among rare plants. 田野筆記把這種罕見植物列為其中之一。
A yachan specimen was placed on the table for study. 一株罕見植物樣本被放在桌上研究。
The wealthy billionaire owns a luxurious yacht and travels all over the world. 那位富有億萬富翁擁有一艘豪華遊艇，環遊世界。
They spent a relaxing weekend sailing on their private yacht. 他們在私人遊艇上航行，度過了一個輕鬆的週末。

meaning: 遊艇世界；玩遊艇的社交圈
sentences: He knew little about the rules of yachtdom. 他對遊艇圈的規矩所知不多。
The magazine described the luxury life of yachtdom. 那本雜誌描述了遊艇世界的奢華生活。

meaning: 遊艇駕駛者；玩遊艇的人
sentences: The yachter steered the boat into the harbor. 那位遊艇駕駛者把船駛進港口。
Every yachter must watch the weather closely. 每位遊艇駕駛者都必須密切注意天氣。
Yachting is a popular sport among the wealthy in coastal cities. 遊艇運動在沿海城市的富人中是一項受歡迎的運動。
He enjoys going yachting with his friends every weekend. 他喜歡週末和朋友們一起去玩帆船（遊艇運動）。

meaning: 遊艇愛好者；遊艇運動參與者
sentences: The yachtist spent the summer racing along the coast. 那位遊艇愛好者整個夏天都在海岸線上比賽。
A yachtist often enjoys both speed and sea air. 遊艇運動參與者通常同時享受速度與海風。
The yachtman checked the sails before departure. 那位遊艇駕駛者在出發前檢查了帆。
An experienced yachtman knows how to read the sea. 有經驗的遊艇駕駛者知道如何判讀海況。

meaning: 駕駛遊艇的技術；遊艇操作能力
sentences: His yachtmanship improved after years of practice. 經過多年練習，他駕駛遊艇的技術進步了。
Good yachtmanship depends on calm judgment. 良好的遊艇操作能力取決於冷靜判斷。

meaning: 遊艇駕駛者，帆船運動員
sentences: The experienced yachtsman guided the vessel through the narrow channel. 有經驗的遊艇駕駛者引導船隻通過狹窄的水道。
He has been a professional yachtsman for over twenty years. 他擔任專業帆船運動員已超過二十年。

meaning: 像遊艇駕駛者的；有遊艇手風度的
sentences: His yachtsmanlike manner impressed the crew. 他那種像遊艇手的風度讓船員印象深刻。
She spoke in a calm and yachtsmanlike way. 她以沉著而有遊艇手風度的方式說話。

meaning: 遊艇駕駛技藝；操艇本領
sentences: The contest tested each sailor's yachtsmanship. 這場比賽考驗每位水手的操艇本領。
Fine yachtsmanship is learned on the water. 細膩的遊艇駕駛技藝是在水上學會的。

meaning: 女性遊艇駕駛者；女帆船手
sentences: The yachtswoman won the race by a wide margin. 那位女遊艇駕駛者以明顯差距贏得比賽。
Each yachtswoman on the team wore a life jacket. 隊上的每位女帆船手都穿著救生衣。
The resort had a yachty feel with white sails everywhere. 那座度假村到處都是白帆，帶著遊艇般的氣息。
He wore a yachty jacket on the sunny pier. 他在陽光下的碼頭上穿著一件很有遊艇風格的外套。

meaning: 指揮棒；指讀經時使用的指示棒
sentences: The rabbi held a yad while reading the scroll. 拉比在誦讀經卷時拿著一根指棒。
A yad helps the reader keep the place in the text. 指棒能幫助讀者保持在文本的位置。

meaning: 耶達瓦人；古印度族群名
sentences: The history class discussed the Yadava dynasty. 歷史課討論了耶達瓦王朝。
A Yadava ruler once governed parts of western India. 一位耶達瓦統治者曾治理印度西部的部分地區。

meaning: 玉；古字或方言用法中的玉石
sentences: The old poem praised the shine of yade. 那首舊詩讚美了玉石的光澤。
A small yade pendant hung from the cord. 一個小玉墜掛在繩子上。
The dog would yaff whenever strangers passed. 每當陌生人經過，那隻狗就會短促地吠叫。
A fox may yaff at night in the woods. 狐狸夜裡可能在樹林中短叫。

meaning: 愛吠的狗；吠聲尖銳的動物
sentences: The little yaffingale barked at the gate. 那隻愛吠的小狗在門口叫個不停。
The old tale called the noisy hound a yaffingale. 舊故事把那隻吵鬧的獵犬叫作愛吠的狗。
A yaffle called from the edge of the wood. 一隻綠啄木鳥在林邊鳴叫。
We saw a green yaffle on the trunk. 我們在樹幹上看見一隻綠啄木鳥。

meaning: 粗大的木杵；可用來敲擊的木棒
sentences: The farmer used a yagger to crush the grain. 農夫用木杵把穀粒搗碎。
A heavy yagger lay beside the old mill. 舊磨坊旁放著一根沉重的木棒。
He ate yaghourt with fruit for breakfast. 他早餐吃了加水果的優格。
The recipe calls for plain yaghourt. 這個食譜需要原味優格。
The radio operator set up a yagi on the roof. 無線電操作員在屋頂上架起一支八木天線。
A yagi can focus signals in one direction. 八木天線能把訊號集中在一個方向。
The article described a Yagnob village in the mountains. 那篇文章描述了山中的一個雅格諾布村落。
A Yagnob speaker shared local stories with the class. 一位雅格諾布語使用者向全班分享了地方故事。
The yagourundi moved silently through the grass. 那隻獵豹貓悄悄穿過草叢。
A yagourundi can climb and hunt very well. 獵豹貓很會攀爬和捕獵。
The museum display explained Yagua culture. 博物館展品介紹了雅瓜族文化。
A Yagua elder spoke about river life. 一位雅瓜族長者談到河流生活。

meaning: 雅瓜族；雅瓜族人（小寫形式）
sentences: The travel notes mentioned a yagua community. 旅行筆記提到了一個雅瓜族社群。
Researchers interviewed a yagua family by the river. 研究人員在河邊訪問了一個雅瓜族家庭。

meaning: 美洲獅貓；一種中南美洲野貓
sentences: A yaguarundi slipped across the trail at dusk. 一隻美洲獅貓在黃昏時溜過小徑。
The yaguarundi has a slender body and short legs. 美洲獅貓有細長的身體和短腿。

meaning: 一種水鳥；舊式地名或族名用字
sentences: The old book named a yaguaza among the marsh birds. 舊書把這種沼澤水鳥列為其中之一。
A yaguaza was drawn beside the wetland map. 地圖旁畫著一隻水鳥。

meaning: 語氣詞；表示輕鬆的「是啊」
sentences: Yah, I suppose we can try that plan. 是啊，我想我們可以試試那個計畫。
He answered with a casual yah and smiled. 他隨口答了一聲是啊，然後笑了。

meaning: 古地名或族名的寫法；罕見專有名詞
sentences: The map placed yahan near the mountain pass. 地圖把這個古地名標在山口附近。
An old chronicle mentioned yahan as a place. 一份舊編年史把它當作地名提到。

meaning: 雅根族；火地島原住民族
sentences: The lesson described the Yahgan people of the south. 那堂課介紹了南方的雅根族人。
A Yahgan hunter once lived near the cold coast. 一位雅根族獵人曾住在寒冷的海岸附近。

meaning: 與雅根族有關的；雅根語的變體稱呼
sentences: The document used a Yahganan label for the dialect. 文件用雅根相關的名稱標記那種方言。
A Yahganan word list was found in the archive. 檔案裡找到了一份雅根語詞表。

meaning: 粗魯、粗魯、大聲或粗魯的人。
sentences: The term yahoo refers to a rough, coarse, loud or uncouth individual. 雅虎一詞指的是粗魯、粗俗、大聲或粗俗的人。
The lesson introduced yahoo as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了雅虎這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 粗野的人；也可指狂放的叫喊
sentences: The novel portrayed him as a noisy Yahoo. 那部小說把他描寫成一個粗野的人。
He shouted a loud Yahoo after the score. 他在得分後大聲吶喊。

meaning: 粗野愚昧的世界；野蠻人的領域
sentences: The satire mocked the foolish customs of Yahoodom. 那篇諷刺作品嘲弄了粗野世界的愚蠢習俗。
In the fable, Yahoodom was a land of mockery. 在寓言裡，那是個被嘲笑的國度。
His yahooish manners embarrassed the guests. 他那粗野的舉止讓客人感到尷尬。
The writer described the crowd in yahooish terms. 那位作家用粗野的字眼描寫那群人。

meaning: 粗野愚昧的行為；野蠻作風
sentences: The essay criticized yahooism in public life. 那篇文章批評了公共生活中的粗野作風。
Yahooism can turn a debate into a shouting match. 粗野作風會把辯論變成吵架。

meaning: 雅胡納族；南美原住民族名
sentences: The ethnography chapter described the Yahuna people. 民族誌章節介紹了雅胡納族人。
A Yahuna story was translated for the museum. 博物館把一則雅胡納族故事翻譯出來。
The report mentioned a Yahuskin camp by the river. 報告提到河邊有一個雅胡斯金營地。
A Yahuskin elder spoke about the old trails. 一位雅胡斯金長者談到了舊時的路徑。
The hymn praised Yahweh with great reverence. 那首聖歌以極大的敬意讚美耶和華。
Many believers use Yahweh as a sacred name. 許多信徒把耶和華當作神聖的名稱。
The lecture explained the history of Yahwism. 那場講座解釋了耶和華崇拜的歷史。
Yahwism shaped many religious traditions. 耶和華信仰塑造了許多宗教傳統。

meaning: 耶和華崇拜者；雅威派信徒
sentences: The scholar referred to him as a Yahwist. 那位學者把他稱為耶和華崇拜者。
A Yahwist often appears in studies of ancient religion. 耶和華崇拜者常出現在古代宗教研究中。

meaning: 與耶和華崇拜有關的；雅威式的
sentences: The text has a clear Yahwistic tone. 這段文字帶有明顯的雅威式色彩。
Researchers studied the Yahwistic sources carefully. 研究者仔細研究了與耶和華崇拜有關的來源。
The old yair stood across the stream and trapped fish. 那座古老的魚梁橫在溪流上，用來攔魚。
Farmers repaired the yair before the spring flood. 農人趁春汛前修補了那道攔魚堰。
The children played in the yaird behind the house. 孩子們在屋後的院子裡玩耍。
She swept the yaird every morning before breakfast. 她每天早上都先把院子掃乾淨。
In the glossary, yaje is explained as an old ritual verb. 詞彙表裡把這個詞解釋成一個古老的祭祀動詞。
The poem uses yaje to suggest worship and offering. 那首詩用這個動詞來暗示敬拜和獻祭。
The chemist isolated yajeine from the plant extract. 化學家從植物萃取物中分離出這種生物鹼。
Researchers studied yajeine for its possible medicinal use. 研究人員研究這種生物鹼的潛在藥用價值。
Yajenine was listed beside several related plant alkaloids. 這種生物鹼和幾種相關的植物生物鹼一起被列出。
The sample contained only a trace of yajenine. 那個樣本裡只含有微量的這種生物鹼。
The priest led a Yajna at sunrise. 祭司在日出時主持了一場祭儀。
A Yajna often includes fire, chants, and offerings. 祭儀通常包含火焰、誦唱和供品。

meaning: 雅吉納瓦爾基亞；古印度哲人
sentences: The class read a short passage about Yajnavalkya. 課堂上讀了一段關於雅吉納瓦爾基亞的文字。
Yajnavalkya is remembered as an important ancient sage. 雅吉納瓦爾基亞被視為重要的古印度智者。
The ceremony included the gift of a yajnopavita. 儀式中還贈送了一條聖線。
He wore the yajnopavita as a sign of initiation. 他佩戴那條聖繩，象徵已受入門儀式。
A yak can survive the cold air of the high mountains. 牦牛能在高山的寒冷空氣中生存。
The traveler saw a yak grazing near the snowy path. 旅行者看見一頭牦牛在雪路旁吃草。
The exhibit introduced the art of the Yaka people. 展覽介紹了雅卡族的藝術。
A Yaka speaker helped translate the village interview. 一位雅卡語使用者協助翻譯那場村落訪談。
The map marked Yakala as a small community in the region. 地圖把雅卡拉標成該地區的一個小聚落。
Historians noted Yakala in several older records. 歷史學家在幾份舊記錄裡提到雅卡拉。
The farmer kept a yakalo for its strength and wool. 農夫飼養了一頭牦牛雜交種，因為牠結實又有毛。
A yakalo is adapted to rough mountain life. 牦牛雜交種很適合崎嶇的山區生活。
The article mentioned a Yakamik settlement by the river. 那篇文章提到河邊有一處雅卡米克族聚落。
A Yakamik elder spoke about the old hunting trails. 一位雅卡米克族長者談到古老的狩獵小徑。
The documentary focused on Yakan weaving traditions. 那部紀錄片聚焦於亞坎族的織布傳統。
A Yakan teacher taught children in the local language. 一位亞坎族教師用當地語言教孩子們。
The guide said a yakattalo is stronger than a common cow. 嚮導說，牦牛水牛雜交種比普通牛更強壯。
A yakattalo can carry loads in difficult terrain. 牦牛水牛雜交種能在難走的地形背負貨物。

meaning: 雅基馬；地名、河名或族名
sentences: They visited Yakima during their trip to Washington State. 他們在華盛頓州旅行時順道去了雅基馬。
The Yakima River runs through a wide valley. 雅基馬河流經一個寬闊的山谷。
The word yakin means near or close in some languages. 在某些語言裡，這個詞表示接近或親近。
He felt yakin to the family after many visits. 經過多次拜訪後，他和那家人感到很親近。
Building the fence was a full day of hard yakka. 砌這道圍欄是一整天的苦工。
She respected the yakka it took to finish the job. 她很敬佩把這份工作完成所需要的辛勞。
The yakman led the herd across the ridge at dawn. 牦牛牧人在黎明時帶著牛群越過山脊。
Every yakman in the village knew the safest route. 村裡每位牦牛牧人都知道最安全的路線。
Yakona appeared on an old map of the coast. 一張古老的海岸地圖上標出了雅科納。
The story described Yakona as a distant settlement. 那個故事把雅科納描寫成遙遠的聚落。
The report mentioned a Yakonan family living inland. 報告提到有一戶雅科納人家庭住在內陸。
A Yakonan elder shared the history of the valley. 一位雅科納族長者分享了山谷的歷史。
The museum displayed Yakut clothing and tools. 博物館展示了雅庫特人的服飾和工具。
A Yakut translator helped with the oral history project. 一位雅庫特語翻譯員協助了口述歷史計畫。

meaning: 雅庫塔特；阿拉斯加地名
sentences: The plane landed in Yakutat after a long flight north. 飛機經過漫長的北向飛行後降落在雅庫塔特。
Yakutat is known for cold weather and wild scenery. 雅庫塔特以寒冷天氣和荒野景色著稱。
The old flag seemed to yalb in the strong wind. 那面舊旗似乎在強風中拍動。
He could yalb the loose panel with one hand. 他可以用一隻手把鬆動的板子晃動。
He was accepted into Yale University to study law. 他被耶魯大學錄取學習法律。
The front door is secured with a high-quality Yale lock. 前門用高品質的耶魯鎖鎖著。
She hopes to study at Yale after graduation. 她希望畢業後能到耶魯大學就讀。
The door was fitted with a Yale lock for safety. 那扇門裝了耶魯鎖來加強安全。

meaning: 耶魯大學的學生或校友
sentences: The speaker identified himself as a Yalensian. 那位講者自稱是耶魯大學的校友。
Many Yalensians returned for the reunion dinner. 許多耶魯校友回來參加重聚晚宴。
The yali stood right on the edge of the water. 那座臨水宅邸就蓋在水邊。
We passed a row of old yalis along the shore. 我們沿岸經過一排舊宅邸。
Yalla, we need to leave before sunset. 快點，我們得在日落前出發。
She shouted yalla to hurry the group along. 她喊著快點，催大家趕路。

meaning: 催促別人的人；喊快點的人
sentences: The yallaer kept pushing everyone toward the gate. 那個催促別人的人一直推著大家往門口走。
He acted like a yallaer whenever the train was late. 每次火車晚點時，他就像個愛催人的人。
The paper had turned yallow with age. 那張紙因年代久遠而泛黃。
A yallow light filled the room at dawn. 破曉時，一道淡黃的光充滿房間。
Yams are a healthy and delicious type of root vegetable. 山藥是一種健康且美味的根莖類蔬菜。
She added some roasted yams to the fresh garden salad. 她在新鮮花園沙拉中加入了一些烤山藥。
The museum explained the history of the Yamacraw people. 博物館說明了亞馬克羅族的歷史。
A Yamacraw elder told stories of the old village. 一位亞馬克羅族長者講述舊村落的故事。
The article described a Yamamadi community in the forest. 那篇文章描述了森林裡的一個亞馬馬迪族社群。
A Yamamadi hunter led the visitors through the trails. 一位亞馬馬迪族獵人帶著訪客走過小徑。
The display included a framed yamamai moth. 展示櫃裡有一隻裝框的日本山蠶蛾。
Silk from yamamai has long been valued in Japan. 日本山蠶的絲長久以來都很受重視。
The traveler wrote about a remote yamanai village. 旅行者寫到一個偏遠的亞馬奈村落。
Yamanai appeared in the notes as a local name. 亞馬奈在筆記裡被記作一個地方名稱。
The geologist labeled the sample as yamaskite. 地質學家把那塊樣本標記為亞馬斯基特。
A thin layer of yamaskite was found in the rock. 岩石中發現了一層薄薄的亞馬斯基特。
The lesson discussed the Yamassee and their history. 那堂課談到了亞馬西族及其歷史。
A Yamassee leader negotiated with neighboring groups. 一位亞馬西族領袖與鄰近族群協商。
Yamato is often used as a poetic name for Japan. 大和常被用作日本的詩意名稱。
The old text referred to the Yamato court. 舊文獻提到大和朝廷。
The passport showed the name Yamel on the first page. 護照首頁寫著雅梅爾這個名字。
Yamel was also used as the name of a small settlement. 雅梅爾也被用作一個小聚落的名稱。
The magistrate waited in the yamen to hear the petition. 縣官在衙門裡等著聽取請願。
Old stories often describe the yamen as a busy office. 舊故事常把衙門描寫成忙碌的官署。

meaning: 雅梅奧族；族名或語言名
sentences: The archive included a short Yameo vocabulary list. 檔案裡收錄了一小份雅梅奧語詞彙表。
A Yameo speaker helped record the traditional songs. 一位雅梅奧語使用者協助錄下傳統歌謠。

meaning: 雅米爾克；一種名字或地名
sentences: The map listed Yamilke beside the river road. 地圖把雅米爾克標在河邊道路旁。
Historians treated Yamilke as an old local name. 歷史學家把雅米爾克視為一個古老地名。
The report described a Yammadji camp near the hills. 報告描述了山丘附近的一處亞瑪德吉族營地。
A Yammadji guide explained the seasonal route. 一位亞瑪德吉族嚮導說明了季節性的路線。
Stop yammering about the weather and let's go for a walk. 別再嘮叨天氣了，我們去散步吧。
He spent the entire afternoon yammering about his boss. 他整個下午都在抱怨他的老闆。
The forager dug up yamp from the sandy soil. 採集者從沙地裡挖出野薯。
Yamp was roasted over the fire for dinner. 野薯在火上烤熟後當晚餐。

meaning: 亞姆帕；一種野生植物或地名
sentences: The guide pointed out yampa growing near the stream. 嚮導指給我們看溪邊長著的亞姆帕植物。
The valley was named after the Yampa River. 那個山谷是以亞姆帕河命名的。

meaning: 亞姆夫；yamp 的變體拼法
sentences: The old spelling yamph appeared in the margin. 舊拼法出現在頁邊。
The editor noted yamph as a regional variant. 編輯把它註明為地方變體。

meaning: 俄式馬車夫；驛車駕駛者
sentences: The yamshik drove the sleigh through the snow. 那位俄式馬車夫駕著雪橇穿過雪地。
An old tale praised the yamshik for his skill. 一則舊故事稱讚那位馬車夫的技術。

meaning: 俄式馬車夫；驛車駕駛者
sentences: The yamstchik stopped the cart beside the inn. 那位俄式馬車夫把車停在旅店旁。
Travelers trusted the yamstchik on icy roads. 旅人信任那位馬車夫在冰路上的駕駛能力。
In some transliterations, yan refers to the active principle. 在某些音譯裡，這個音譯詞指的是積極的原理。
The lesson paired yan with yin as a contrast. 那堂課把陽與陰並列成對比。
The museum collected stories from the Yana people. 博物館蒐集了亞納族的故事。
A Yana word list helped preserve the language. 一份亞納語詞表有助於保存這種語言。
The history book mentioned Yanan as an important city. 歷史書把延安列為重要城市。
We studied how Yanan became a key political center. 我們研究了延安如何成為重要的政治中心。

meaning: 罕見的松樹名；也指其木材
sentences: The guide pointed to a tall yancopin on the slope. 嚮導指著坡上的一棵高大松樹。
The carpenter used yancopin for the old cabinet. 那位木匠用這種松木做舊櫥櫃。
The cabin stood yander beyond the creek. 小屋在溪流那邊。
He waved to the horse that was grazing yander. 他朝遠處正在吃草的馬揮手。
The term yang refers to the cry of the wild goose; a honk. 陽，指大雁的叫聲；一聲喇叭。
The lesson introduced yang as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了“陽”這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。
The farmer harvested sweet yangtao in autumn. 農夫在秋天收成了甜美的獼猴桃。
She sliced a ripe yangtao for breakfast. 她把熟透的奇異果切開當早餐。
They yanked the product as soon as they learned it was unsafe. 當他們得知該產品不安全時，他們立即撤回了該產品。
People often yank when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會猛烈地撤退。
The old song praised the brave Yankee soldiers. 那首老歌歌頌勇敢的洋基士兵。
He called himself a Yankee with a grin. 他笑著說自己是個洋基人。
The writer described his trip through Yankeedom. 作家描述了他穿越洋基地區的旅程。
They studied the customs of Yankeedom in class. 他們在課堂上研究洋基文化圈的習俗。
The company tried to Yankeefy its marketing slogan. 公司試圖把行銷口號改成洋基風格。
Do not Yankeefy the local festival too much. 不要把當地節慶改得太洋基化。
His speech was full of Yankeeism and regional pride. 他的談話充滿洋基式說法與地方自豪感。
The book explained the history of Yankeeism. 那本書解釋了洋基作風的歷史。

meaning: 洋基派人士；主張洋基作風的人
sentences: The newspaper mocked the speaker as a Yankeeist. 報紙把那位演講者嘲諷成洋基派人士。
A Yankeeist may favor strict habits and plain speech. 洋基派人士往往偏好嚴謹作風與樸實言談。

meaning: 使美式化；使帶洋基色彩
sentences: The studio tried to Yankeeize the foreign film. 影視公司試著把外國電影美式化。
They did not want to Yankeeize the neighborhood market. 他們不想把社區市場改得太洋基風。

meaning: 洋基國度；美國北方地帶
sentences: He dreamed of moving to Yankeeland one day. 他夢想有一天搬到洋基國度去。
The map marked Yankeeland as a cultural region. 地圖把洋基國度標成一個文化地帶。
Her speech had a strong sense of Yankeeness. 她的談吐很有洋基氣質。
The novel captures the Yankeeness of the town. 那部小說捕捉到那座城鎮的洋基味。
The yanking of the rope startled the crew. 繩索被猛拉時，把船員都嚇了一跳。
There was a loud yanking from the broken door. 那扇壞門傳出一陣用力扯動的聲音。
The museum exhibit highlighted Yankton history. 博物館展覽重點介紹楊克頓族的歷史。
A Yankton elder shared stories with the children. 一位楊克頓長者和孩子們分享故事。

meaning: 楊克托奈人；楊克頓支族
sentences: The document listed the Yanktonai as one tribe. 那份文件把楊克托奈人列為一個部族。
A Yanktonai dancer performed at the festival. 一位楊克托奈舞者在節慶上表演。

meaning: 洋基式的；美國北方味的
sentences: The house had a slightly yanky style. 這棟房子帶著一點洋基式風格。
His joke sounded yanky to the local audience. 他的笑話在當地聽眾耳中有點洋基味。
The coach called him a Yannigan after practice. 訓練後，教練叫他這個小混混。
That Yannigan kept teasing the younger boys. 那個調皮鬼一直捉弄年紀較小的男孩。
The book described the Yao people of southern China. 那本書介紹了中國南方的瑤族。
A Yao elder explained the meaning of the song. 一位瑤族長者解釋了那首歌的含義。
She drank a cup of yaoort with breakfast. 她早餐時喝了一杯優格飲品。
The recipe called for fresh yaoort and honey. 那份食譜需要新鮮酸奶和蜂蜜。
The cake had a soft yaourti flavor. 那塊蛋糕帶有柔和的優格味。
They served a cool yaourti sauce with the dish. 他們為那道菜端上清涼的優格醬。
The little dog would yap at every visitor. 那隻小狗會對每位來客狂吠。
Do not yap all afternoon about minor problems. 不要整個下午都為小問題喋喋不休。

meaning: 加碼贈品；附帶的小東西
sentences: The shopkeeper added a yapa to the purchase. 店主在這筆買賣裡多送了一件小禮物。
In some places, yapa means a little extra. 在某些地方，這個詞指額外加送的小東西。
The puppy followed us yaply along the path. 那隻小狗一路愛吠地跟著我們走。
He spoke yaply whenever he grew nervous. 他一緊張就會喋喋不休地說話。
A Yapman explained the island's fishing customs. 一位雅浦島居民解釋了島上的捕魚習俗。
The guidebook described the Yapman culture. 那本指南介紹了雅浦人的文化。

meaning: 吠叫聲；喋喋不休的狀態
sentences: The yapness of the dog annoyed the neighbors. 那隻狗的吠叫聲讓鄰居很困擾。
Her yapness disappeared after the argument ended. 爭論結束後，她那種喋喋不休的狀態就消失了。
The yapok swam quietly across the stream. 那隻水負鼠安靜地游過小溪。
Scientists studied the yapok in wet habitats. 科學家研究生活在濕地裡的水負鼠。
A sharp yapp came from the alley. 巷子裡傳來一聲尖細的叫聲。
The puppy gave a tiny yapp and ran away. 那隻小狗短促地叫了一聲就跑開了。

meaning: 吠叫了；喋喋不休地說了
sentences: The dog yapped until someone opened the gate. 那隻狗一直吠叫，直到有人打開大門。
He yapped about the schedule all morning. 他整個早上都在為行程喋喋不休。

meaning: 愛吠的狗；愛喋喋不休的人
sentences: That yapper would not stop barking at strangers. 那隻愛吠的狗對陌生人叫個不停。
Everyone knows him as the office yapper. 每個人都知道他是辦公室裡愛講話的人。
The yappiness of the terrier woke the baby. 那隻梗犬愛吠的聲音吵醒了嬰兒。
Her yappiness made the room feel noisy. 她喋喋不休的樣子讓房間顯得很吵。
The yapping outside lasted for an hour. 外面的吠叫持續了一個小時。
All that yapping made it hard to concentrate. 那些嘮叨讓人很難專心。
The small dog followed yappingly behind us. 那隻小狗在我們後面一路吠叫。
He complained yappingly about the long line. 他喋喋不休地抱怨那條長長的隊伍。
The yappish dog barked at every bicycle. 那隻愛吠的狗對每一輛腳踏車都叫。
Her yappish tone made the meeting awkward. 她那種嘮叨的語氣讓會議變得很尷尬。
The yappy puppy never stayed quiet for long. 那隻愛叫的小狗總是安靜不了多久。
He sounded yappy after too much coffee. 他喝太多咖啡後講話就變得很愛嘮叨。
The neighbors joked that he was a true yapster. 鄰居開玩笑說他真是個愛嘮叨的人。
That yapster kept talking through the whole ride. 那位愛講不停的人整路都沒停過。
The festival featured Yaqui music and dance. 節慶活動呈現雅基族的音樂與舞蹈。
A Yaqui teacher taught the class a greeting. 一位雅基語老師教全班一句問候語。
They drove to Yaquina to see the coast. 他們開車去雅基納看海岸。
The map placed Yaquina near the river mouth. 地圖把雅基納標在河口附近。
Happy New Yar! I hope you have a great one. 新年快樂（新「年」快樂）！希望你過得愉快。
She plans to travel to Europe later this yar. 她計畫今「年」晚些時候去歐洲旅行。

meaning: 準備狩獵的警戒姿態；機警狀態
sentences: The hawk stood in yarak before striking. 那隻鷹在俯衝前保持警戒姿態。
He watched the field in full yarak. 他全神戒備地注視著那片田地。
The old glossary listed yaray as a rare term. 那本舊詞彙表把這個詞列為罕見詞。
A scholar noted yaray in the margin. 一位學者在頁邊註記了這個詞。
The healer gathered yarb from the hillside. 那位療者從山坡上採集草藥。
She dried the yarb before making tea. 她先把藥草曬乾再泡茶。
Professor Yarborough gave the opening lecture. 亞伯勒教授做了開場演講。
The letter was addressed to the Yarborough family. 那封信是寄給亞伯勒一家。
The kids are playing happily with the dog in the backyard. 孩子們正和狗在後院開心地玩耍。
Our new house has a large front yard with many flowers. 我們的換新家有一個種了很多花的大前院。
The contractor measured the yardage of the fabric. 承包商量了布料的碼數。
Football players care about every yardage gain. 美式足球員很在意每一次推進的碼數。
The geologist studied a tall yardang in the desert. 地質學家研究沙漠裡一條高高的風蝕脊。
Wind carved the yardang into a sharp ridge. 風把那道風蝕脊雕成尖銳的稜線。
The sailor climbed the yardarm to fix the sail. 水手爬上桅杆橫臂修理帆布。
A flag fluttered from the yardarm all morning. 整個早上，旗子都在桅杆橫臂上飄動。
The yarder loaded tools into the truck. 那名場地工人把工具裝上卡車。
A yarder kept the work area neat and clear. 場地工人把工作區整理得乾淨清楚。
A yardful of children ran after the ball. 一整院的孩子追著球跑。
The family had a yardful of autumn leaves. 這家人的院子裡堆滿了秋葉。

meaning: 堆放在院中；圍成院子的行為
sentences: The yarding of logs began before dawn. 木材在天亮前就開始堆入院中。
They studied the yarding of cattle in the field. 他們研究把牛群圍進院中的做法。
The yardkeep checked the gate before dusk. 庭院看守在黃昏前檢查大門。
A good yardkeep keeps the grounds orderly. 優秀的院落管理者會把場地維持得井然有序。
The history text defined a yardland as a land unit. 歷史課本把這個詞定義為一種土地單位。
Few people use the word yardland today. 今天已很少人使用這個古老詞語。
The yardman trimmed the hedges after lunch. 那名庭院工人在午餐後修剪樹籬。
A yardman swept the station platform at night. 場地管理員在夜裡清掃車站月台。
The yardmaster organized the trains before sunrise. 車場調度員在日出前安排好列車。
Each yardmaster must keep the tracks moving safely. 每位貨場主任都必須確保軌道安全運作。
The yardsman kept the freight area organized. 場地工人把貨運區整理得井井有條。
Every morning, the yardsman checked the gates and paths. 每天早晨，場地工人都會檢查大門和通道。
The carpenter used a yardstick to mark the board. 木匠用一把量尺在木板上做記號。
Profit is not the only yardstick for success. 利潤不是衡量成功的唯一標準。
He measured the cloth with a long yardwand. 他用一根長量棒量那塊布。
The old surveyor carried a wooden yardwand. 那位老測量員帶著一根木製測量杆。
The yare sailor climbed the mast with ease. 那位敏捷的水手輕鬆爬上桅杆。
A yare fox darted across the field. 一隻靈巧的狐狸迅速穿過田野。
The guide pointed to a tiny yareta on the rocks. 嚮導指向岩石上的一小叢高山墊狀植物。
Yareta grows very slowly in cold mountain places. 高山墊狀植物在寒冷的山地生長得非常慢。
The dog began to yark at the gate. 那隻狗開始在門口狂吠。
He heard a bird yark loudly in the dark. 他聽見一隻鳥在黑暗中尖叫。
The caravan stopped at Yarkand before sunset. 商隊在日落前停在葉爾羌。
Yarkand has long been an important oasis town. 葉爾羌長久以來都是重要的綠洲城鎮。
He gave the rope a quick yarke to free it. 他猛拽繩子把它拉鬆。
The boy tried to yarke the heavy bag from the cart. 那個男孩試著把沉重的袋子從推車上急拉下來。
The yarl ruled his coastal lands from a stone hall. 那位貴族從石造大廳治理他的海岸領地。
In the old tale, the yarl was wise and stubborn. 在那個古老故事裡，酋長既聰明又固執。
He yarly refused to answer the question. 他倔強地拒絕回答那個問題。
The horse moved yarly when the rider pulled too hard. 騎士拉得太用力時，那匹馬便粗暴地躁動起來。
The train stopped for a few minutes at Yarm. 火車在雅姆停了幾分鐘。
She took a walk through the old streets of Yarm. 她在雅姆的老街上散步。
She bought several skeins of colorful wool yarn to knit a sweater. 她買了幾捲彩色羊毛紗線來織毛衣。
The old sailor told us a long and fascinating yarn about his travels. 那位老海員給我們講了一個關於他旅行的漫長且迷人的故事。
The old fisherman liked to yarnen by the fire. 那位老漁夫喜歡在火邊閒聊。
They yarnened about school until midnight. 他們一直閒聊到半夜。
The yarner kept the room laughing for an hour. 那位講故事的人讓整個房間笑了整整一小時。
She worked as a yarner in the old textile mill. 她在那家老紡織廠當紡紗工。
The child watched the yarnwindle grow on the spindle. 那個孩子看著紗團在紡錘上越繞越大。
A careful yarnwindle keeps the thread neat. 仔細纏紗能讓線保持整齊。
The herb book mentioned yarpha as a rare plant. 那本草本書把亞法列為罕見植物。
A single yarpha grew beside the stream. 溪邊只長著一株亞法。
The dog would yarr whenever strangers came near. 只要陌生人靠近，那隻狗就會怒吼狂吠。
He heard the crowd yarr from the pier. 他聽見人群從碼頭那邊大聲吼叫。
The rider chose a strong yarraman for the trip. 騎士為這趟旅程挑了一匹健壯的馬。
The old stockman praised the yarraman for its speed. 那位老牧馬人稱讚那匹好馬跑得很快。
A tall yarran shaded the dry creek bed. 一棵高大的金合歡樹為乾涸的溪床遮蔭。
The fence was built from yarran wood. 那道籬笆是用金合歡木做的。
The child shook the yarringle to make it ring. 那個孩子搖了搖小鈴環，讓它發出聲響。
The horse wore a tiny yarringle on its harness. 那匹馬的挽具上掛著一個小鈴環。
She picked yarrow from the edge of the field. 她從田邊採了西洋蓍草。
The tea had yarrow and tasted slightly bitter. 那杯茶加入了西洋蓍草，喝起來略帶苦味。
The poem spoke of the yarth under winter snow. 那首詩描寫了冬雪下的大地。
He knelt and touched the yarth with his hand. 他跪下來，用手觸摸泥土。
The pot had a simple yarthen look. 那個陶罐看起來很有泥土質感。

meaning: 雅什馬克（穆斯林婦女戴的面紗）

Each Yasht honors a different divine figure. 每一篇祈禱頌都讚頌不同的神聖形象。

meaning: 禮拜儀式；阿維斯陀經文
sentences: The ceremony followed the rules of the Yasna. 典禮依照禮拜儀式的規範進行。

meaning: 冬青茶樹；可泡茶的葉子
sentences: The gardener planted a yaupon near the porch. 園丁在門廊旁種了一棵冬青茶樹。

Every yawler must watch the tide carefully. 每位駕小帆船的人都必須仔細觀察潮汐。

meaning: 操縱小帆船的人；小帆船上的船員
sentences: The yawlsman kept the boat steady in the harbor. 那位小帆船船員讓船在港內保持穩定。
Every yawlsman on the crew knew the river by heart. 船隊裡的每位小帆船船員都對那條河流非常熟悉。

meaning: 偏航測量器；測量偏轉角度的儀器
sentences: The engineer checked the yawmeter before the flight. 工程師在飛行前檢查了偏航測量器。
A yawmeter helps the pilot keep the aircraft aligned. 偏航測量器能幫助飛行員讓飛機保持對準。
He couldn't stop yawning during the long and boring lecture. 在漫長而乏味的講座中，他忍不住一直打哈欠。
A yawn is often a sign that someone is tired or needs more oxygen. 打哈欠通常是某人疲勞或需要更多氧氣的信號。

meaning: 打哈欠的人；容易令人發困的事物
sentences: The tired child was a nonstop yawner during the film. 那個疲倦的孩子在看電影時一直打哈欠。
That long speech was such a yawner that half the room looked sleepy. 那場冗長的演說實在太無聊，半個房間的人都看起來昏昏欲睡。

meaning: 愛打哈欠的；令人想打哈欠的
sentences: He felt yawney after the late-night study session. 熬夜讀書後，他感到很想打哈欠。
The warm, yawney afternoon made everyone sluggish. 那個溫暖又讓人想打哈欠的午後，使大家都變得懶洋洋。

meaning: 充滿哈欠的；令人犯困的
sentences: It was a yawnful afternoon in the quiet classroom. 那是個安靜教室裡充滿哈欠的午後。
The yawnful meeting dragged on too long. 那場讓人犯困的會議拖得太久了。
She yawnfully opened the book and started reading. 她困倦地打開書開始閱讀。
He smiled yawnfully and asked for more coffee. 他一邊打哈欠一邊微笑，還要了更多咖啡。
The puppy yawnily stretched beside the fire. 那隻小狗在火爐旁懶洋洋地伸了個懶腰。
She yawnily listened to the rest of the lecture. 她昏昏欲睡地聽完了剩下的講課。
A wave of yawniness came over him after lunch. 午飯後，一陣倦怠感湧上他的身子。
The room's yawniness made it hard to stay alert. 那個房間讓人想打哈欠的氛圍，使人很難保持清醒。

meaning: 打哈欠的；張開的；寬大的
sentences: A yawning gap opened between the two ideas. 這兩個觀念之間出現了巨大的落差。
The yawning cave looked dark and silent. 那個張口般的大洞穴看起來又黑又安靜。
He answered yawningly and rubbed his eyes. 他懶懶地打著哈欠回答，還揉了揉眼睛。
The dog yawningly followed its owner to the door. 那隻狗懶散地跟著主人走到門口。

meaning: 不易令人發困的；不無聊的
sentences: The teacher tried to make the lesson yawnproof. 老師努力把這堂課講得不無聊。

meaning: 愛打哈欠的人；總是一副困倦樣的人
sentences: The coach joked that the team looked like a group of yawnups. 教練開玩笑說，這支隊伍看起來像一群總在打哈欠的人。

meaning: 令人想打哈欠的；懶洋洋的
sentences: The yawny weather made everyone stay indoors. 這種讓人懶洋洋的天氣使大家都待在室內。

meaning: 神聖的木棉樹；瑪雅文化中的世界樹

meaning: 與亞茲德格爾德有關的；波斯古王朝的

meaning: 幼羊；剛出生不久的小羊

meaning: 持續一整年的；為期一年的
sentences: They launched a yearlong study of the river. 他們展開了一項為期一年的河流研究。

meaning: 充滿渴望的；殷切盼望的
sentences: She gave him a yearnful look from across the room. 她從房間另一頭投來一個充滿渴望的眼神。

sentences: The yearnling waited by the window for news. 那個滿懷思念的人在窗邊等消息。

The poet wrote about yearth and sky. 那位詩人寫的是大地與天空。
The roots reached deep into the yearth. 根部深深伸入土壤之中。
You need to add yeast to the flour to make the bread rise. 你需要在麵粉中加入酵母以使麵包發酵升起。

meaning: 像酵母地；活潑地；帶有發酵感地
sentences: The dough rose yeastily in the warm kitchen. 麵團在溫暖的廚房裡像發酵般慢慢膨起。

meaning: 發酵；加入酵母；使起作用
sentences: Yeasting the dough takes patience and warmth. 讓麵團發酵需要耐心和溫度。

meaning: 發酵的；有酵母味的；活潑的
sentences: The yeasty bread smelled fresh and warm. 那種帶有酵母味的麵包聞起來新鮮又溫暖。

Another yeat had passed before he returned. 另一個年頭過去後，他才回來。

meaning: 去；走了；古語動詞過去式
sentences: He yed down the road at sunrise. 他在日出時沿著道路走去。
The old tale says the knight yed alone into the hills. 舊故事說那位騎士獨自走進山裡。

meaning: 表示答應或呼喚的聲音
sentences: Yee, the children shouted when the game began. 好耶，遊戲開始時孩子們大聲喊道。
He gave a cheerful yee and waved back. 他快活地喊了一聲，然後揮手回應。
The child began to yeel when he saw the storm. 那孩子看見暴風雨時開始尖叫。
No one wanted to yeel in the quiet library. 沒有人想在安靜的圖書館裡大聲喊叫。

Nobody wanted to sit next to the yeelaman at dinner. 晚餐時沒有人想坐在那個喧鬧的人旁邊。
A few yees rose from the crowd after the speech. 演說結束後，人群中傳來幾聲贊同的呼聲。
The meeting ended with loud yees from the back row. 會議在後排傳來的大聲附和中結束。
The police caught the yegg near the station. 警方在車站附近抓到了那名竊賊。
In the story, a clever yegg slipped through the window. 在故事裡，一名狡猾的竊賊從窗戶溜了進去。
The yeggman was careful to leave no fingerprints. 那名爆竊犯小心到連指紋都沒留下。
A yeggman in the novel carried a bag of tools. 那部小說裡的一名竊賊帶著一袋工具。
The yeguita trotted beside the larger horses. 那匹小母馬跟在較大的馬旁邊小跑。
A farmer led the yeguita to the water trough. 農夫把那匹小馬牽到水槽旁。
The yeld field produced almost no grain. 那塊貧瘠的田幾乎沒有產出穀物。
A yeld tree stood alone on the hill. 山坡上孤零零地站著一棵不結果的樹。
A small yeldrin sang from the hedge. 一隻小黃鳥在樹籬上唱歌。
The children watched the yeldrin hop across the grass. 孩子們看著那隻黃鳥在草地上跳來跳去。
The yeldrock flashed yellow in the sunlight. 那隻黃鳥在陽光下閃著黃色。
He pointed out a yeldrock perched on the fence. 他指著停在柵欄上的一隻小黃鳥。
The yelk was bright and rich in color. 蛋黃的顏色鮮明而濃郁。
She separated the yelk from the white carefully. 她小心地把蛋黃和蛋白分開。
Don't yell at me; I can hear you perfectly well. 別對我喊；我聽得很清楚。
The coach yelled instructions to the players from the sidelines. 教練從場邊對球員們大聲喊著指令。

meaning: 大喊大叫的人；愛叫喊的人
sentences: The yeller in the hall was hard to ignore. 走廊裡那個大喊大叫的人很難不注意到。

Do not yelloch across the quiet room. 不要在安靜的房間裡大聲喊叫。
Sunflowers are famous for their large and bright yellow petals. 向日葵以其大而鮮艷的黃色花瓣聞名。
The taxi was painted bright yellow so it was easy to spot. 計程車被漆成鮮黃色，所以很容易辨認。
A yellowammer sang from the tall grass. 一隻黃眉鳥在高草叢裡歌唱。
The guide said the yellowammer was common here. 嚮導說這裡常見黃眉鳥。

meaning: 黃背封面的廉價書；廉價小說
sentences: He found a dusty yellowback on the shelf. 他在架上找到一本佈滿灰塵的廉價小說。
The old station sold yellowbacks to travelers. 那座老車站曾賣廉價小說給旅客。
The bully called him a yellowbelly. 那個惡霸罵他是個膽小鬼。
Nobody wanted to be seen as a yellowbelly. 沒有人想被看成懦夫。
A yellowberry grew near the edge of the path. 小路邊長著一顆黃色漿果。
The bird pecked at a ripe yellowberry. 那隻鳥啄食了一顆熟透的黃莓果。
The yellowbill sat quietly on the branch. 那隻黃嘴鳥靜靜地停在樹枝上。
A yellowbill flashed its bright beak near the water. 一隻黃嘴鳥在水邊亮出牠鮮黃的喙。
A yellowbird flitted through the garden. 一隻黃鳥在花園裡飛來飛去。
The children pointed at the yellowbird on the fence. 孩子們指著柵欄上的那隻黃鳥。

meaning: 黃冠鳥；頭頂呈黃色的鳥
sentences: The yellowcrown gleamed among the leaves. 那隻黃冠鳥在樹葉間閃閃發亮。
We saw a yellowcrown near the riverbank. 我們在河岸附近看見一隻黃冠鳥。
A yellowcup opened beside the stone wall. 石牆旁開出一朵黃杯花。
The gardener planted yellowcup along the path. 園丁把黃杯花種在小路旁。
The fisherman brought in a large yellowfin. 漁夫捕到一條很大的黃鰭鮪。
Yellowfin is prized for its firm flesh. 黃鰭鮪因肉質結實而受重視。
A yellowfish swam close to the boat. 一條黃魚游到船邊。
The pond was full of small yellowfish. 池塘裡滿是小黃魚。
A yellowhammer sang from the hedgerow. 一隻黃眉鶥在樹籬邊唱歌。
The yellowhammer is known for its bright color. 黃眉鶥以鮮亮的羽色著稱。

meaning: 黃頭鳥；頭部呈黃色的鳥
sentences: The yellowhead perched on the garden gate. 那隻黃頭鳥停在花園門上。
A yellowhead darted through the reeds. 一隻黃頭鳥穿過蘆葦叢飛去。
The yellowing of the pages showed their age. 書頁發黃顯示出它們的年代。
We noticed yellowing in the old leaves. 我們注意到那些老葉子正在變黃。
Something described as yellowish is somewhat yellow in colour. 被描述為黃色的東西的顏色有點黃色。
The word yellowish is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 黃色這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The yellowishness of the light made the room warm. 那道微黃的光讓房間顯得溫暖。
He mentioned the yellowishness of the paint. 他提到那層油漆帶有微黃的色調。

meaning: 加拿大西北地區首府黃刀
sentences: We flew to Yellowknife in the middle of winter. 我們在冬天中途飛往黃刀。
Yellowknife is known for its cold, clear skies. 黃刀以寒冷而清澈的天空聞名。

meaning: 黃腿鷸；腿呈黃色的涉禽
sentences: A yellowlegs waded through the marsh. 一隻黃腿鷸在沼澤裡涉水而行。
The yellowlegs lifted one leg and waited still. 那隻黃腿鷸抬起一條腿，靜靜等著。
The lamps shone yellowly through the fog. 燈光在霧中泛著黃色。
The old paper had yellowly faded edges. 那張舊紙的邊緣已經泛黃褪色。
The yellowness of the cloth made it stand out. 那塊布料的黃色讓它很顯眼。
He noticed the yellowness in the old teeth. 他注意到那些舊牙齒的泛黃。
Yellowroot grows well in damp soil. 黃根草在潮濕土壤中長得很好。
The herbalist dried the yellowroot for later use. 草藥師把黃根曬乾以備日後使用。

meaning: 黃臀鳥；臀部呈黃色的鳥
sentences: A yellowrump flashed past the window. 一隻黃臀鳥從窗前掠過。
The yellowrump settled on the fence post. 那隻黃臀鳥停在柵欄柱上。
The leaf yellows when autumn arrives. 秋天來時，葉子會變黃。

meaning: 黃籽植物；黃色種子的植物
sentences: Yellowseed spread along the roadside ditch. 黃籽植物沿著路邊水溝蔓延。
The botanist labeled the sample as yellowseed. 那位植物學家把樣本標記為黃籽植物。

meaning: 黃腿鷸；腿部偏黃的水鳥
sentences: A yellowshank stood at the edge of the water. 一隻黃腿鷸站在水邊。

meaning: 黃腿鷸群；腿部偏黃的水鳥們
sentences: Yellowshanks gathered near the shallow pond. 一群黃腿鷸聚在淺池邊。
We saw several yellowshanks feeding at dusk. 我們在黃昏時看見幾隻黃腿鷸覓食。

meaning: 黃脛鳥；脛部呈黃色的鳥
sentences: A yellowshins hopped across the wet sand. 一隻黃脛鳥跳過濕沙地。
The yellowshins was easy to spot by the shore. 這隻黃脛鳥在海邊很容易辨認。

meaning: 黃尾魚；尾部呈黃色的魚
sentences: The yellowtail jumped when the line tightened. 釣線一緊，那條黃尾魚就躍了起來。
Yellowtail is often served fresh as sashimi. 黃尾魚常以生魚片方式新鮮供應。

meaning: 黃刺樹；帶黃色刺的灌木
sentences: The yellowthorn blocked the narrow path. 那株黃刺樹擋住了狹窄的小路。
A yellowthorn grew beside the dry wall. 乾牆旁長著一株黃刺樹。

meaning: 黃喉鳥；喉部呈黃色的鳥
sentences: The yellowthroat sang from the reeds. 那隻黃喉鳥在蘆葦叢裡唱歌。
A yellowthroat flashed its bright throat patch. 一隻黃喉鳥閃出牠鮮亮的喉斑。

meaning: 黃頂花；頂部開黃花的植物
sentences: Yellowtop brightened the meadow in late summer. 晚夏時，黃頂花讓草地亮了起來。

meaning: 黃花雜草；開黃花的野草
sentences: Yellowweed grew fast along the fence line. 黃花野草沿著圍欄長得很快。

The yellowwood tree cast deep shade. 那棵黃木樹投下濃密的樹蔭。
Craftsmen valued yellowwood for its fine grain. 工匠看重黃木細緻的木紋。
Yellowwort grew beside the stone steps. 石階旁長著黃花草。

The old paper looked yellowy at the edges. 那張舊紙的邊緣看起來有點偏黃。

Do not yelm when everyone is trying to rest. 大家都在休息時，不要怒吼。

meaning: 突然的、高亢的噪音或話語。
sentences: The puppy let out a yelp when I stepped on her tail. 當我踩到小狗的尾巴時，小狗發出了一聲叫聲。
The term yelp refers to an abrupt, high-pitched noise or utterance. 術語「尖叫」指的是突然的、高音調的噪音或話語。
The little dog was a loud yelper at the gate. 那隻小狗在大門口尖聲狂吠。

Yemen is a country on the Arabian Peninsula. 葉門是阿拉伯半島上的一個國家。

The Yemeni family lived near the market. 那戶葉門家庭住在市場附近。
A Yemeni trader sold spices in the town. 一位葉門商人在鎮上販售香料。

The old story described a Yengee visiting the port. 那個古老故事描寫一位洋人造訪港口。

The village watched the Yengeese arrive by boat. 村民看著那些洋人坐船抵達。
In the tale, the Yengeese came from far away. 在那個故事裡，外國人們從很遠的地方而來。

She preferred the yeni style of furniture. 她比較喜歡那種新式家具。
The Yenisei is one of the great rivers of Siberia. 葉尼塞河是西伯利亞的大河之一。
They studied the map of the Yenisei valley. 他們研究了葉尼塞河谷的地圖。

meaning: 葉尼塞族的；葉尼塞語系的
sentences: The book discussed Yeniseian languages. 那本書討論了葉尼塞語系。

The geologist labeled the sample as yenite. 地質學家把那塊樣本標為葉榴石。
Tiny crystals of yenite sparkled in the rock. 岩石裡細小的葉榴石晶體閃閃發亮。

meaning: 葉榴石；一種舊式礦物名稱
sentences: The old catalog listed the mineral as yentnite. 舊目錄把那種礦物列作葉榴石的舊名。
A sample of yentnite sat on the shelf. 架子上放著一塊葉榴石樣本。

meaning: 舊式用語中的人；年輕人
sentences: The yeo stood at the gate and waited. 那位年輕人站在門口等著。
In the story, a yeo carried the message home. 在故事裡，一位年輕人把消息帶回了家。
The yeoman worked hard on his small farm. 那位自耕農在自己的小農場上辛勤工作。

sentences: She handled the task in a yeomanlike way. 她以勤勉可靠的方式處理那項工作。

The crew yeomanly finished the repairs. 船員們踏實地完成了修繕。

He handled the problem yeomanwise and calmly. 他以踏實穩重的方式處理了那個問題。
The work was done yeomanwise, without fuss. 那項工作做得很踏實，沒有多餘的花俏。
The yeorling stayed close to the herd. 那隻一歲幼畜緊跟著畜群。
A yeorling needs care during the cold months. 一歲幼畜在寒冷月份需要照顧。

meaning: 女自耕農；女性鄉村勞動者
sentences: The yeowoman worked beside her husband in the field. 那位女自耕農和丈夫一起在田裡工作。
A yeowoman was respected for her hard labor. 那位女性鄉村勞動者因勤勞而受人尊敬。
Yep, I can help you this afternoon. 是的，我今天下午可以幫你。
Yep, that answer sounds right to me. 對，這個答案聽起來是對的。
Yer coat is hanging by the door. 你的外套掛在門邊。
Yer friends already arrived before noon. 你們的朋友在中午前就到了。
The article described a Yerava family in the hills. 文章描述了山區的一戶耶拉瓦家庭。
A Yerava elder spoke at the meeting. 一位耶拉瓦長者在會上發言。

meaning: 耶拉瓦人；耶拉瓦族成員
sentences: The Yeraver guide knew the forest paths well. 那位耶拉瓦嚮導很熟悉森林小路。

The yerba gave the tea a mild taste. 那種茶草讓茶味道很溫和。
The old field guide listed yercum among herbs. 舊野外指南把那種草藥列入清單。
A bundle of yercum dried on the shelf. 一束那種草藥在架上晾乾。
The yerd behind the house was quiet. 房子後面的庭院很安靜。

He tried to yerk the door open. 他試著猛拉把門打開。

She yerned for a chance to travel. 她渴望有一次旅行的機會。
The old poem praised the yerth and sky. 那首舊詩讚美大地與天空。
He knelt and touched the yerth with his hand. 他跪下來用手碰了碰泥土。
Yes, I understand your question. 是的，我懂你的問題。

Yeah, that sounds like a great idea! Let's do it. 沒錯，聽起來是個好主意！我們就這麼辦吧。

meaning: 是的；肯定的回答；古舊拼法
sentences: The old letter ended with a simple yese. 那封舊信以簡單的肯定語句作結。

meaning: 猶太經學院；猶太教高等學府
sentences: The student studied in a Yeshibah abroad. 那位學生在國外的猶太經學院求學。

meaning: 猶太經學院；猶太教學校
sentences: He spent years learning at a Yeshiva. 他在猶太經學院學習了好幾年。

Yest, the messenger had already arrived. 是的，信使已經到了。
He answered with a quick yest and smiled. 他迅速以一句肯定回答，然後笑了。

meaning: 狩獵時的呼喊聲；催趕的喊聲
sentences: The rider shouted yoicks across the field. 騎手在原野上大喊狩獵呼喊。
Yoicks was used to urge the hounds on. 這種喊聲用來催促獵犬前進。

meaning: 印度古代長度單位；由若干里組成的距離
sentences: The map marked the route as one yojan. 地圖把這段路標成一個古代長度單位。

meaning: 印度古代長度單位；長距離的計量
sentences: The temple inscription mentioned several yojana. 那塊寺廟銘文提到好幾個古代長度單位。
A yojana could represent a long journey. 這個單位可以表示很長的路程。

meaning: 約胡安族；北美原住民族名
sentences: The museum exhibit included Yojuane history. 博物館展覽包含了約胡安族的歷史。

meaning: 與役畜有關的大量工作，持續約半天；任何工作的數量或輪班。
sentences: to work two yokes 工作兩個軛
The term yoke refers to an amount of work done with draught animals, lasting about half a day; an amount or shift of any work. 「軛」一詞是指對役畜所做的大量工作，持續約半天；任何工作的數量或班次。

sentences: The bird guide listed the yoldring under an old name. 鸟类图鉴把这种旧名列为旧名称。

They built a yurta near the pasture. 他們在牧場附近搭了一頂蒙古包。

meaning: 尤魯卡雷族人；尤魯卡雷語
sentences: The book described Yurucare customs. 那本書介紹了尤魯卡雷族的習俗。
A Yurucare family lived by the river. 一戶尤魯卡雷族家庭住在河邊。

meaning: 尤魯卡雷族的；與尤魯卡雷族有關的
sentences: The researcher studied Yurucarean speech. 研究者研究了尤魯卡雷族的語言。
Yurucarean pottery was displayed in the hall. 尤魯卡雷族陶器陳列在大廳裡。

meaning: 尤魯卡里族人；尤魯卡里族的
sentences: The guide met a Yurucari hunter at dawn. 嚮導在清晨遇見一位尤魯卡里族獵人。
The village had long been home to Yurucari families. 那個村落長久以來都是尤魯卡里族家庭的家園。

meaning: 尤魯朱雷族人；尤魯朱雷族的
sentences: The map marked a Yurujure territory. 地圖上標出了尤魯朱雷族的領地。
A Yurujure elder explained the old path. 一位尤魯朱雷族長者解釋了那條古老路徑。
The history book mentioned the Yuruk. 歷史書提到了尤魯克族。
A Yuruk caravan crossed the plain. 一支尤魯克族商隊穿過平原。
The exhibition covered Yuruna life. 這場展覽介紹了尤魯納族的生活。
A Yuruna elder spoke beside the fire. 一位尤魯納族長者在火邊發言。

meaning: 亞馬遜神話中的尤魯帕里
sentences: The legend of Yurupary was passed down orally. 尤魯帕里的傳說以口述方式流傳。
The storyteller named Yurupary as a sacred figure. 說故事的人把尤魯帕里稱為神聖人物。
The note used yus as an old spelling of yes. 那張便條把它當作舊式的肯定詞。
He answered with a quick yus and smiled. 他迅速回了一句「是的」，還笑了。
The dancers followed the sound of the yusdrum. 舞者跟著尤斯鼓的聲音起舞。
An old yusdrum hung in the village hall. 村裡禮堂掛著一面古老的尤斯鼓。

meaning: 尤斯塔加族人；尤斯塔加族的
sentences: The chronicle described the Yustaga people. 那部編年史記述了尤斯塔加族。
A Yustaga chief met the traders. 一位尤斯塔加族首領會見了商人。
The field guide listed the yutu as a bird of the plains. 那本野外指南把它列為平原鳥類。
A yutu darted through the tall grass. 一隻南美走禽快速穿過高草。
The old record used yuzlik for the number one hundred. 舊紀錄用它表示一百。
She wrote the yuzlik mark beside the figure. 她在那個數字旁邊寫下百位記號。
The list grouped the workers in yuzluk sets. 名單把工人按百人組分開。
A yuzluk bundle sat on the shelf. 架子上放著一捆百個一組的物品。
Yvonne arrived with the afternoon train. 伊馮搭下午的火車抵達。
The teacher called on Yvonne to read aloud. 老師請伊馮朗讀。
